detail.title: Partner Collaboration
detail.content:
📌 **This feature is only available for**[ ](https://bytedance.feishu.cn/docx/YVSSdFlS4olNfdxSPjecs8kYnOg)TAP **partners on TTSPC.** ## Affiliate Partner Introduction ### **What is Affiliate Partner ？** Affiliate partner can connect scalable creators with merchants/supply chains to help both parties improve efficiency and optimize creator level up. Affiliate Partner is Identified as **" Seller and Scalable Creator Match-up"** category on TTSPC ### **What's the benefits of Affiliate Partner？** 1. You can use it as a tool for product-based collaborations with sellers and creators. A replacement for offline collaboration/ target plan with full visibility on operational workflow of the collaboration for product/seller-based collaboration. 2. You can effectively reach a large number of sellers and product resources through campaigns, helping you quickly and quickly discover new products and popular products. 3. A more flexible way of cooperating with creators, you can generate exclusive product links and distribute them to a large number of creators, helping you to earn commissions according to the sales of all products sold by creator. ## Partner Settle in guide Entrance：[https://partner.tiktokshop.com/](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/) Affiliate partner will be open to register in the following markets： For local Partner: Support partners located and service in **Indonesia, Thailand, Philippines, Malaysia, Singapore and Vietnam.** **Please** choose "Seller and Scalable Creator Match-up" **on the category selection page** ### Documents to be prepared before settling in: [Partner self-onboard guide](https://bytedance.feishu.cn/docx/RHwGdhlRCoThRwxsRXwch0Jdnlg?from=from_copylink) If you already have an Affiliate Partner role on[ TikTok shop partner platform](https://affiliate.tiktokglobalshop.com/partner/auth/welcome), you can log in with your previous accounts and refer to [Affiliate Partner Migration playbook](https://bytedance.feishu.cn/docx/UZhzdEsxio708Zx03LVc8SDrnCg?from=from_copylink) ### Settle in process **Case 1 If you do not have a TikTok Partner Center account, please follow the**[ Partner self-onboard guide ](https://bytedance.feishu.cn/docx/RHwGdhlRCoThRwxsRXwch0Jdnlg?from=from_copylink)**. Please** choose "Seller and Scalable Creator Match-up" **on the category selection page** ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/9b56ad4d2f9c426db40a287749677c38~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) **Case 2 If you have a TikTok Partner Center account but without "**Seller and Scalable Creator Match- up **"category certification, you can add a category application** You can add **"**Seller and Scalable Creator Match-up " category through Profile➤my category&market➤Add category&market After clicking Submit, you need to supplement the Affiliate Partner information (including :**Company information &Contact information, and Proof of partner operating capability)** refer to [TikTok Shop Partner Center Guide](https://bytedance.feishu.cn/docx/doxcnpxGEdlf0MHDcH7N88ZBhkc?from=from_copylink) ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/8ac114c7b2df40f5829bc1f9288ded32~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/9578c8ed606e44adaaf1194df66e764d~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) **Case 3 If you** already have Affiliate Partner accounts on [TikTok partner platform](https://affiliate.tiktokglobalshop.com/partner/partner-creator/link?tab=all) You can log in with your existing account on [TikTok partner platform](https://affiliate.tiktokglobalshop.com/partner/partner-creator/link?tab=all) with Email/ Phone number and password. After logging in, you will have the certification of **"**Seller and Scalable Creator Match-up**"** category automatically. ## **Introduction of product features** ### 1.Active account and links bank account #### Activate Account If you have already activated your account previously, i.e. on any other service category on TTSPC, you can skip this step. Your account will be activated automatically. You can go to [finance]-[payment account] to active account for each category. ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/cecc7e38b4f444bdb9c654b81c89d4fd~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/2ed3f1df44b34907a2ce56b54c6631ef~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) After clicking active account,you can check the results(including: active/failed/pending)
#### **Link bank account (SEA)** **After active account, you need to link bank account(s).**
Please provide the relevant information about the bank card . Click continue after completion Note：The bank name of the bank card must be consistent with the entity name of the partner ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/3fc1799b7c9f4cfcb4ed77747dc6fc20~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/0f13c0a95cb7485ba650e514de0fec41~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) You can check the link bank information and change account after successfully linking. **How to change account？** After clicking**[Change account]**, you can click **manage** and choose a bank account to set primary. ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/09909d5fdc3946a2971194b766046628~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/b7f28be3a0fa4bea850e70c5bacea526~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) #### **Link bank account (UK)**
* After the account has been activated successfully, users could click ‘Link bank account’ and it will redirect to PIPO's cashier for adding payout method. * Users could click Bank Transfer to add a new bank account. The minimum payment amount is 1 GBP and maximum is 250,000 GBP. * Add payout information: * E-mail address：type with own e-mail address * Routing Number: 9-digit numbers provided by bank. * Accounting Number: 3-17 digit bank account number. * Account type: Saving account/Checking account. * Billing address: could be autofilled when click 'same as business registered address' or entered independently. * Confirm the bank account information. * Receive OTP at the e-mail address and complete OTP process. * Bank accounts will be linked and shown as masked account in payment method. ### 2.Partner Collaboration #### Partner ##### Scenario 1: Create Partner Collaboration Partner creates collaboration, and reporting items through **[TTSPC] ➤[Creator Matchmaking] ➤ [Create collaboration]**.
* Please refer to Collaboration Information instructions and fill in the collaboration information，After checking, click [Submit] to go to the collaboration list. * **After submiting the collaboration, please wait sellers registration or approve product:** sellers select the campaign from campaign marketplace on seller center, register for products, and define the product commission rate (commission should be a package); | | File | Explanations & Requirements | Screenshot | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Basic Information
| Collaboration name
| * Seller will catch the collaboration title quickly. Please show the collaboration information simply and clearly
* no more than 50 words |
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/4aa71ce9e02c4a48a0e38b5155de02ef~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)

| | | Description | No more than 1000 words | | | | Product registration period | * During the Product registration period, sellers can register products
* Maximum 360 days, minimum 1 day | | | | Collaboration active period
| * During the active period, if the products are reviewed and approved by partner, product link will be generated automatically and can be shared with the creator to add and sell products
* Maximum 360 days, minimum 1 day
* The registration start time will be consistent with the campaign period start time by default. | | | Seller information | | * Set the targeted sellers of this partner collaboration. You can only cooperate with sellers in the same market. We recommend contacting sellers about the intended creator groups before promoting their products, to avoid potential issues with certain collaborations.

**++Case 1 i++**++f you choose++**++ Selected sellers++**
Your collaboration will be shown to targeted sellers. You can insert **shop code to select your** **sellers**
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/af6e9265c09542d19a5a6355b41881e0~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)

> **Tips：how to get shop code？**
> You can guide sellers to go to seller center and 【my account】➤【seller profile】-【seller information】to check shop code
>
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/7839d0f6b0a7449aaa81d556066ceee7~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)

**++Case 2: ++**++if you choose++**++ All sellers++**
Your collaboration will be shown to all sellers in your market. You can choose **local, cross-border sellers and all sellers**
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/f6cce3bbda2645d99428a63eb4243c07~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
Note: Your selected sellers need to be consistent with your target market
| | | Commission rate requirement | | * This is the total of affiliate partner commission rate and creator commission rate. The requirement will be displayed to the targeted sellers.
* You can set Commission rate requirement to **1-80%, and numbers should be integer, like:10,20,30 etc**

| | | Contact information

| | * Fill in your contact information to help sellers contact you .
* WhatsApp and email are compulsory fields, phone number is optional
* Country code set to SG by default, can change to all country codes

| | | Social account (optional)
| | Click on "Link TikTok Account" , you will see Linking requirements
> The TikTok account holder must be at least 18 years old.
> The status of the TikTok account must be active and have no violation history.
> The TikTok account cannot be a registered business account.
> The TikTok account cannot be linked with another agency.


![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/754ed044e564460c9fed4d0116d9041f~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/418243d9093240f7bb5a86c2bee267ec~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
| | ##### Scenario 2: Product selection, share and remove * Partners can view all types of collaborations in the Collabs list, check collaboration details, select products, and share with creators. * After a partner creates a collaboration, they need to wait for the seller to complete product registration or approve products before they can select products and share with creators. **View collabs** * Manage: View all collaborations you've joined * Discover: Browse collaborations you haven't joined yet – click "Join" to get started * Closed: View collaborations you previously joined that have now ended | File | Explanations & Requirements | Screenshot | | --- | --- | --- | | Filter by status
| All：show all collabs
Upcoming：upcoming collabs
Ongoing：ongoing collabs |
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/fc44d4f17b534e40a1aca5b3a1acd8e1~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)

| | Filter by collab type | **My collabs: partners** create collaborations
**Seller collabs**：seller create collaborations
**Exclusive Tiktok Shop collabs**：Platform created collabs
**Global Selling Collabs**：Platform created collabs with cross border merchandises.
**Has pending closed products**：If a seller removes a product from collaboration, partner will get a notification. Click "Review" to see all collaborations that have products pending removal. | | | View details | View collab details: after clicking the button, partners could select products and share with creators. | | **Select products and share with creators** * Partner can click View details for an joined ongoing collabs and enter the collabs info page to view the registered products, **[Partner collaboration] ➤[Manage] ➤ [View details].** * For collaborations partners haven't joined: Join first, then click "View collaboration details" to select products and share with creators.**[Partner collaboration] ➤[Discover] ➤ [Join].** * Partners can search for products by **product name** and do batch reviews by selecting multiple products. Before sharing with creators, partners should comfirm commissions.
**Moderating seller removed products (approve/ deny)** * [Partner collaboration] ➤[Manage] ➤ [Has pending closed products] * When a seller requests to remove products, a notification is displayed on the partner side. After the partner clicks the "Review" button, collaborations containing products in **[Has pending closed products]** status are filtered and shown in the list. * Once a seller requests to remove a product, partners'll **have 5 days to approve or reject the request**. If no action is taken within 5 days, the seller's request will be automatically approved and the product will be removed from the collaboration.
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/4772f63417d34886a690e7565f6e139b~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/40403dc77e224cd582d4b4948cd62310~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
##### Scenario 3: Check Performance
* View the overall product promotion performance under the campaign * Click **[Partner collaboration] ➤[Manage] ➤ [View details]➤ [Performance]** to view the sold product performance data, support searching for products by product ID: * The **data overview** will display the following information: * Sold products * Paid orders * Settled orders * Estimated commission base: total GMV from distribution links, including refunded orders * Actual commission base： total GMV from distribution links * Estimated affiliate partner commission * Actual affiliate partner commission * The **Product performance** part will be displayed in reverse order according to the payment of the product, including the following information: * Product info: name/id/price * CPS rate * Creator'sCPS * affiliate partner's CPS rate * Paid orders * Settled orders * Estimated commission base * Estimated affiliate partner commission * Actual commission base * Actual affiliate partner commission * Action: view performance by single product * If you would like to **export the data of the products sold and its details, such as creator and commission, y**ou can get it from the "Earnings" page in the "Finance" tab on the platform. ##### Scenario 4: Check Earnings and payment How can partners view the commission and payments after the campaign? Please refer to the following process: **Click Finance- Earnings,partners can enter the Earnings page to view the detailed data of the orders** | **Workflow** | **Screen shot** | | --- | --- | | You can check the overview of the orders, including paid orders and not paid orders(orders have not yet been completed)

***You can switch the service type and market if you have multiple categories or markets. This service type is "Affiliate Partner".** |
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/6a2634db1a8a4e929431888b5e4ae241~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
| | On the details order page

* you can switch by **pending payment, paid, payment failed tab and check orders.**
* **You can check details of all orders that have been paid into your bank account under the paid tab.**
* You can search by **creator username, product ID,order time created, order time delivered**

For COD orders, only after the delivery period can COD orders be paid to creator and MCN/TAP.

Order includes the following details：

1. Order ID：
2. Affiliate Creator: creator/username/nickname
3. Product: product image, name, specification, product
4. Price & Quantity
5. Order Status： in progress, completed, cancelled
6. Content Type : livestream, short video, showcase
7. Affiliate partner CPS
8. Creator CPS
9. Estimated commission base
10. Estimated commission revenue
11. Estimated creator commission：
12. Actual commission base
13. Actual affiliate partner commission
14. Actual affiliate creator commission
15. Returns&Refunds
16. Time created
17. Time delivered
18. Time commission paid
19. Paid method |
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/72e96c1dfed445abbee183be2d73ef8c~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)

| | Click [export all] to export data

1. Support search by **creator username / product ID/order created time/order delivered time**
2. Support CSV and Excel format | ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/cabd20fb21424a2388ce0151bde0541d~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) | For orders that have already been paid, you can click [payments] to check the payment details of each order. 1. Support search by **payment time** 2. Support export order data.
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/ed107ba85f5241b3bbf3362cb9d507a0~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/ad90680058cb42099dedb841c0d14762~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
##### Scenario 5: Sample Management * Partners no longer get creator's sample authorization and apply samples for creators. * Sample management tab has been offlined at the mid of March, and now creators are suggested to request samples by themselves, then partners can review sample applications in Manage samples page.
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/aa0fd672368a409c92336aad96df9fb9~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
View details- Sample management
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/5b1207c6b73a4bc0840f9ceb3f915de5~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
Creator Management- Manage samples
#### Seller ##### Scenario 1: Create Partner Collaboration Seller creates **Partner Collaboration**, and reporting items through**[Affiliate Center] ➤[Work with partners] ➤ [Partner Collabs]➤ [Create Collaboration]**. Please refer to ++Campaign Information instructions++ and fill in the campaign information. After checking, click [Submit] to go to the campaign list. ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/444e4fef583641f895dd5e2bd91f8b88~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) **Campaign Information Instruction** ###### 01 Bacis info | File | Explanation & Requirements | Screenshot | | --- | --- | --- | | Campaign Name | Agency will catch the Campaign title quickly. Please show the campaign information simply and clearly | ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/db061c00ea6f4c059e5dd058f8613668~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
| | Description (optional) | -- | | | Objective | Helping agencies understand how to meet seller business goals, please select at least one objective | | | Registration period | During the Registration period, agencies can join campaigns. | | | Campaign period | * During the Campaign period, if the products are reviewed and approved by partner, product link will be generated automatically and can be shared with the creator to add and sell products
* Note: The registration start time will be consistent with the campaign period start time by default. | | | Registration type | * The campaign can be shown to all agencies or targeted agencies.
* If sellers choose invite only, please fill out Agency names, and can invite up 20 agencies. After creating campaign, invite agencies list could be changed.

![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/1116f4e7ba1846ed89f159f30f71b92e~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) | | | Campaign exclusive (optional) | Let agencies know about any additional discounts or exclusives available as part of this campaign. | | | Shop info | Email: Auto-populated based on contact email info; editable.
Phone number: optional, manual entry required
WhatsApp: optional, manual entry required | | ###### 02 Select Products * Select Products: add products, set commission, and pre-approve free samples * Up to 200 products * Bulk select products and set commissions
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/b73aafd14d47401f9e4efe317879bd24~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/e1732b8370414251b43940ef23d97d8d~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
###### 03 Set Creator preferences: * In this step, seller should set creator perferences, including creator product category, age range, follower size, contennt format, content styple and etc.
###### 04 Review and create * Before submiting, please make sure all your campaign details are correct * After submitting, agencies can search and join campaigns on TTSPC. ##### Scenario 2: Product registeration/ Approve products Sellers can view campaigns and register products in **Seller center ➤ Work with partners➤** **++Agency initated campaign++/ ++Exclusive Tiktok Shop campaign++**, sellers can find the campaign by searching for the campaign name or partner name. ###### **Register products** ++Case 1: For Agency Campaign++ Sellers can click [register] to select products and register campaign in 3 steps：
Step 1: Select a campaign
Step 2: Register products and set the commission rate.
Step 3: Wait for affiliate partner's approval.
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/dc9f41a0373b40708273947c5b79b8b1~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
++Case 2: For Exclusive TikTok Shop campaign++ Sellers can click **[Invited] ➤[View details]** to accept invitation, approve products and adjust commission as needed.
Accept campaign invitation
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/60960d70585b4fd78e04160fbe2ce19f~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
Review product and set commissions
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/853f60105fad42f79c557baece8d5640~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
###### **View product status and remove registered items** * Products approved by the affiliate partner will be labeled as "Ongoing". * Select the registered items sellers want to remove under "Ongoing" status, then click "Close". A confirmation pop-up will appear asking if you're sure you want to delete. Click "Confirm" to complete the removal. * After confirming close registered items, requests is awaiting affiliate partner's approval.
Remove registered items
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/8c0b0df9b117415686f99d8fabdc4d35~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) ##### **Scenario 3: Check perfomance** [Affiliate center] [Work with partners][Seller initiated campaign]/ [Agency initiated campaign]➤ [View details]➤ [Performance] | **Module** | **Instructions** | **Demo** | | --- | --- | --- | | Campaign performance page | Sellers can view the performance data of the promoted products on the campaign performance page

* Data overview:
* Number of products with sales
* Number of paid orders
* Number of actual orders
* Estimated commission base
* Actual commission base
* Estimated total commission
* Actual total commission
* Product information:
* Product image
* Product name
* Product id
* Sale price
* Number of paid orders
* Paid amount
* Total commission rate
* Estimated total commission
* Actual total commission
* Action:
* Search: Sellers can search by product name or product id

Note: Only display the data of products with sales
| ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/cb73ad7888904eb1a26130f98580f756~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
Campaign performance page | #### #### Creator ##### Scenario: Creator adds products **Support adding affiliate partner products through Product List Link** Once creators have received product list link(s) from agencies, they can start adding products. There are 2 ways to add products: 1. **Adding single products**:Simply tap "Add" 2. **Adding all products:** Simply select "Add all to showcase" ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/f82494fa20784f2ca94f50ee4656ad45~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) After adding product to showcase, creator can sell products through live stream /short video/showcase to sell products ## [IMPT] Commission Calculation Logic There are three partnership models and each has its own commission calculation logic. Below are illustrations of how they operate. 1. **Affiliate Partners** > Partnership with Non-binding creators. Commission Calculation: All commission rates of products will be calculated based on the commission split setup during link creation by the agency before sharing it with creators 2. **Agencies functioning as both Creator Management Agency (MCN/CAP) and Affiliate Partners (TAP)** > In this scenario, creators are bound with a MCN/CAP Agency, and add Campaign Product links from the same agency who also works as a TAP partner to their showcases. Commission calculation: The agency takes both the TAP commission from Campaign Commission, as well as the CAP/MCN commission based on the Commission Sharing Agreement signed with the binding Creators. > What this means: If a creator has a commission sharing relationship with MCN/CAP Agency, the commission for the creator will be shared with MCN/CAP Agency based on the commission sharing rate with MCN/CAP Agency. > *For example: If a* *Seller* *sets a total commission of 20% for a product, dividing it as 10% for the affiliate partner (as a TAP Agency) and 10% for the Creator, and the Creator has a 50% commission-sharing arrangement signed with the same affiliate partner (as a MCN/CAP Agency), the Creator will effectively receive 5% commission.* ### **3.Check Earnings and payment** How can I view the commission and payments after the campaign? Please refer to the following process: **Click Finance- Earnings,you can enter the Earnings page to view the detailed data of the orders** | workflow | Screen shot | | --- | --- | | You can check the overview of the orders, including paid orders and not paid orders(orders have not yet been completed)

***You can switch the service type and market if you have multiple categories or markets. This service type is "Affiliate Partner".** | ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/d02143c2aa2e40469ba993048921ac63~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
| | On the details order page

* you can switch by **pending payment, paid, payment failed tab and check orders.**
* **You can check details of all orders that have been paid into your bank account under the paid tab.**
* You can search by **creator username, product ID,order time created, order time delivered**

Note：from January 18, all COD orders will be displayed on the order list.
For COD orders, only after the delivery period can COD orders be paid to creator and MCN/TAP.

Order include the following details：：

1. Order ID：
2. Affiliate Creator：creator /username/nickname
3. Product：product image, name, specification, product
4. Price & Quantity
5. Order Status： in progress, completed, cancelled
6. Content Type ：livestream, short video, showcase
7. Affiliate partner CPS
8. Creator CPS
9. Estimated commission base
10. Estimated commission revenue
11. Estimated creator commission：
12. Actual commission base
13. Actual affiliate partner commission
14. Actual affiliate creator commission
15. Returns&Refunds
16. Time created
17. Time delivered
18. Time commission paid

Support CSV and Excel format | ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/5f1b90d889784fe68c95436b210b5755~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) | For orders that have already been paid, you can click [payments] to check the payment details of each order. 1. Support export order data. ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/1ee29f8288634a039ed7d99953c82a1a~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/b40b1c8f367f44b48ada7e1ac74d7544~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) ### 4.Creator marketplace #### Introduction to creator marketplace creator marketplace will support you viewing the list of creators and creators' information . We support you contacting creators through contact information or sending an invitation to creators Note: creator marketplace is only available for qualified partners, if you have no permission to see creator marketplace, please contact your account manager. #### Step 1 Check the creator list **Click TikTok Shop Partner → Find creator→ Creator Marketplace to check creator marketplace** support the following functions: 1. Search for creator: Search by username/nickname 2. Filtering : Supports filtering by creator's e-commerce categories, followers etc. 3. Set sorting: support sorting by GMV/followers/video release magnitude/average short video playback times What type of creator can be seen on creator marketplace？ ✅ creators who have e-commerce permissions ✅ the creator who were bound by other MCNs ❌ the creator who were official or marketing accounts
If you have **"creator management"** category at the same time, you can switch roles on page to use the creator 's marketplace. After switching roles, the current invitation and application will belong to the current identity. #### Step 2 Creator details page On the creator details page , you can view the detailed information of creators, including: basic information, core data, fan portraits (gender/age), interactive trends ( livestream/videos), and top 3 viewed e-commerce videos .
#### Step 3 Contact and Invite creator #### （1）Check the contact info Click contact on the creator card or the creator details page to get the contact information (including WhatsApp and Email etc)
#### （2）Invite Creator After clicking the invite button, you can send an invitation to the creator with one click, and you can fill in the invitation message (no more than 500 words) and contact information (at least one type contact), After confirming the information, you can click [Send Invitation]. 1. **Invitation message:** Filling in the Invitation Message to show the advantages of the Affiliate Partner will help improve the efficiency of finding products. 2. **information check:** The basic information of the Affiliate Partner will be synchronized to the creator 's side . We suggest Affiliate Partner check the information before inviting creators. > *How to check the information？ > TikTok partner → profile → company information ，you can also click [check information] on the invite creator page to jump directly to the company information page for checking.If there is inaccurate information, you can report to your operator（account manager） to deliver the modification requirement 3. **Contact information:** The contact information that has been filled in automatically based on the existing info provided during registration, you can check and modify if needed. 4. **Invitation limitation:** 1. **Affiliate Partners are allowed to send invitations to a maximum of 100 creators per day, and the same creator can only be sent once within 7 days** *if you have both Affiliate Partner and MCN ： 1. **Invitation limitation:** the total maximum invitation per day is 100, and the same creator can only be sent once within 7 days by both categories. 2. You can choose invitation intention when sending invitation to creators * For MCN: please choose "establish long-term linking relationship with creators" * For affiliate partner： please choose "improve the efficiency of product distribution" ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/edae10f35a55418e9194925bd6edb41c~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/f495c2d1cc604c3aa6eb3a1bb1bb5794~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) #### （3）Creator receive invitation After the Affiliate partner sending the invitation, the creator is able to check this invitation in the TikTok Shop Inbox—notification, which mainly includes following information: 1. The invitation message filled in by Affiliate partner 2. Affiliate partner existing Information:company name, service, category, introduction, address Those creators who are interested in the Affiliate partner can click "I'm interested" button to get the contact information.
#### Step 4 Check Invitation history Entrance: **TikTok Shop Partner Portal → Find creator→ Invitation history** The historical invitation interface will display all the creators who have been sent invitations by MCN . We support the following functions: 1. Search for creator: Search by username/nickname 2. Filter function: Set the start and end time to filter the invitations within the time period 3. View invitation: View the latest invitation information (including invitation information and contact information) through viewing details 4. Resend invitation: support send an invitation to the creator again within one click ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/c3456b9dac804171b30cab9f056e6fde~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/473ae65be91446d6a87c237fc18671d7~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) Note： You can switch the invitation intention if you have both MCN（creator management）and affiliate partner（Seller and Scalable Creator Match-up）role * Link creator ：MCN role * Product distribution：affiliate partner role You can switch markets if you are a cross-border partner and have multiple country certification, after switching the market, you can check the related invitation history.
## FAQ Q：if the product registered by the seller has an ongoing promotion (ex. flash sale, etc), will the buyer that buys via the affiliate partner product campaign get the promotion as well? A：yes, campaign is not conflict with ongoing promotion Q：Could seller registers the same product to 2 different campaigns? A：yes, Sellers can register the same product for different campaigns. Q：If the campaign period is over,what happens to the video that the creator created? A： it won't affect the video, the product link will be invalid and would not generate sales. Q：Will seller be able to contact creator directly and check creator's data? A：seller will not able to check creator's data and contact information on seller center. Q：could seller modify the commission rate during the campaign period？ A：no,sellers are not able to modify the commission rate during campaign period Q:How can i check the contact information of sellers？ You can hover on the profile icon to check the contact information of sellers. ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/0ca824304afb46b88b3d751418b3264c~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) Q：If a seller registers the same product to 2 different campaigns, and then both Affiliate Partners share each of their links to the same creator, what will happen? A：Creator can choose the most appropriate product with preferential commission.(If commission rate of this new link is higher than previous link, the product will be successfully added,if commission rate of this new link is lower than previous link,there will a notification for creator to double check.) Q: Could creator replace the product link with Affiliate open or target plan during the campaign period? A. During the campaign period, the sales generated by affiliate partner product link will be calculated as commission based. Creator will not be able to be deleted and replaced by open plan until the link expires. For example, if the creator adds an open or target plan product and deletes the product links of affiliate partners, they will still add the commission rate of affiliate partners and can't be replaced. Q: What is the threshold of payments? What happens if the withdrawal amount does not meet the required threshold ? A: The threshold of payments is different based on region. Please refer to the following instructions. It will remain unpaid until it meets the required threshold . > CB：1.00USD > ID:10000DR > TH: none > MY:0.01 MYR > VN:10000 VND > PHP:0.01 PHP **Q：How long will I receive the commission payment?** * Indonesia：The order is calculated from the date of delivery, and the payment will be settled one day after the end of 6 days after the sale (the payment will be made on the 7 day after delivery). * Malaysia: The order is calculated from the date of delivery, and the payment will be settled one day after the end of 6 days after the sale (the payment will be made on the 7 day after delivery). * Thailand: The order is calculated from the date of delivery, and the payment will be settled one day after the end of the 7-day post-sales period ( the payment will be made on the 8 day after delivery). * Vietnam: The date of delivery of the order is calculated, and the payment will be settled one day after the end of 6 days after the sale ( the payment will be made on the 7 day after delivery). * Philippines: The order is calculated from the date of delivery, and the payment will be settled one day after the end of 6 days after the sale (the payment will be made on the 7 day after delivery). ***In special circumstances, the settlement cycle may be extended, and we will notify you and complete the payment as soon as possible.* Q: Can Affiliate partner link with multiple bank accounts? Affiliate partner can only link to one bank account and the name of the bank card must be consistent with the entity name of the partner. Q:How does the affiliate partner withdraw their earnings to the bank account that they already linked ? A：After the order is paid successfully and meets the threshold of payment, commission will automatically withdraw to partners linked bank account. Q: How to settle the Affiliate Partner commission? A: it will be based on the commission rate set by sellers,if seller sets 15%for affiliate partner,10%for creator. Then the affiliate partner will get 15% of sales generated by product link,creator will get 10%*sales. note:if creator has commission sharing relationship with MCN,the commission of creator will be shared with MCN based on the commission sharing rate with MCN. eg.++ If seller sets 20% commission in total, set 10% for affiliate partner and 10% for creator, if creator has commission sharing relationship with partner and the commission rate is 50%，then the creator will get 5% commission.++
Q: for creator, how to check if my commission is shared by MCN？ A：if creator is not bound with MCN, on the order page, there will be affiliate partner name, if creator has commission sharing relationship with MCN, there will be a note on besides of commission：**shared with partner** ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/e32c2aec913f40669321b2ec29b86c9b~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
Q：what could I do if there are failed payments？ A：you can click "request payment" to apply for payment. You can check the results after clicking. ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/81f4127994354e3894d4bc4a19c30fb3~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image) ![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/2544bc98050f4bbda95a166d5a569dd7~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
Q: Why is the commission for some of the products on the Finance page zero even though we have fee management setup, which is more than zero? A: Creators have used your campaign links for these product(s). This means that only the commission that you have indicated before generating the link for your creators will prevail. You may check the commission in the "Affiliate Partner" page on the Earnings tab.
